redis_py.signature: getex(, name: KeyT,, ex: Optional[ExpiryT] = None,, px: Optional[ExpiryT] = None,, exat: Optional[AbsExpiryT] = None,, pxat: Optional[AbsExpiryT] = None,, persist: bool = False,)

params.name: key

nredisstack_sync.signature: StringGetSetExpiry(RedisKey key, TimeSpan? expiry, CommandFlags flags = CommandFlags.None)

params.name: key
params.description: The key of the string.

params.name: expiry
params.description: The exact date and time to expire at. MaxValue will remove expiry.

params.name: flags
params.description: The flags to use for this operation.

returns.description: The value of key, or Null when key does not exist.
